micro_rules: Emit lowercase service/value member tokens after the receiver dot.

rows.command_eng: Set the living room light to yellow.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the living room light to yellow","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#LivingRoom #Light).light_currentcolor == \"red\") { (#LivingRoom #Light).light_movetorgb(255, 0, 0) } else { (#LivingRoom #Light).light_movetorgb(255, 255, 0) }"}

rows.command_eng: Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera.
rows.output: {"name":"Capture an image of the meeting room with the camera","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#MeetingRoom_Camera).camera_camerastate == \"on\") { (#MeetingRoom_Camera).camera_captureimage() }"}

rows.command_eng: Set all dehumidifiers in the lab to AI drying mode.
rows.output: {"name":"Set all dehumidifiers in the lab to AI drying mode","cron":"","period":0,"code":"all(#Lab #Dehumidifier).dehumidifier_setdehumidifiermode(\"AIDrying\")"}

rows.command_eng: Set the hue of the living room light to 240 and the saturation to 80.
rows.output: {"name":"Set the hue of the living room light to 240 and the saturation to 80","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#LivingRoom #Light).light_currenthue == 240 and (#LivingRoom #Light).light_currentsaturation == 80) { } else { (#LivingRoom #Light).light_movetohueandsaturation(240, 80) }"}
